channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Real-time showdown: WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling
item.description: Pick the realtime transport that won’t collapse under load — 2026 benchmarks for WebSockets, SSE, and long polling with concrete latency, memory, and cost numbers.

item.title: AI pay split: fine-tune vs prompt in 2026
item.description: AI fine-tuning vs prompt engineering in 2026: 14 % accuracy uplift, 28 ms latency, and $1 200 compute cost — the data-backed salary split every engineer should know

item.title: Ship a system, not a profile
item.description: Ship systems, not projects, to land remote jobs from Africa — benchmarks, cost data, and post-mortems that actually move the needle. 2026 hiring reality.

item.title: Win remote pay talks with Payscale data
item.description: Their offer was $65,000; my market research said $95,000 for the same role and level in New York.

item.title: Senior devs flee big tech: hidden reasons
item.description: 18–22% annual attrition among senior engineers at top tech giants in 2026 despite $210k–$280k salaries. The hidden causes are autonomy loss, approval overload, and on-call burnout — not money.

item.title: FastAPI vs Django REST costs revealed
item.description: FastAPI vs Django REST latency, cost, and hiring trade-offs in 2026 — measured on C6i.large with Redis 7.2 and Python 3.11. Pick the wrong stack and you’ll burn $216/month or debug async leaks at 3 a.m.

item.title: Ship production-grade portfolios from Africa
item.description: Build a portfolio that proves you can ship production code under constraints — not just write code. Includes real examples, benchmarks, and cost breakdowns from African devs who got hired remotely in 2026.

item.title: Choose the right push tech fast
item.description: Pick the right push tech fast — benchmark WebSockets vs SSE vs polling on latency, CPU, and bytes sent for 8,000 updates/sec in 2026

item.title: Leaky RAG: 3 prod traps tutorials ignore
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline latency 77% and cloud bill 64% with Qdrant, Redis, and a reranker layer — the operating details most tutorials skip and the exact configs that worked in production.

item.title: Mis-size your pool? Your app chokes
item.description: Cut database pool size mistakes 70% with these 2026 rules — set pool too high? Your CPU just screamed.

item.title: Pay raise in 7 days: remote salary script
item.description: Use this script to negotiate a remote salary that matches US rates from a lower-cost country — includes data sources, SQLite store, and a FastAPI endpoint to back up your ask. 2026 update.

item.title: AI salaries 2026: prompt vs vector data
item.description: Prompt engineering vs vector search salaries in 2026: $205k vs $185k bands, compliance impact, and the one mistake that costs $420 in Lambda waste.

item.title: Senior devs quit big tech—and it’s not about pay
item.description: Cut on-call pages 88% without raises — connection pools, cache stampedes, and the memory bloat surprise most teams miss.

item.title: Review AI code in minutes, not hours
item.description: Cut AI review time 60%: find broken imports, bad tests, and security holes in 3 minutes with a strict checklist and grep. 2026 numbers inside.

item.title: Make your African dev portfolio show, not just tell
item.description: Prove you can operate a real stack: build a portfolio that deploys in 15 minutes on Render or AWS ECS, not a toy on SQLite and Vercel. 2026 fintech hiring data inside.

item.title: Raise remote pay without leaving home
item.description: Convert local cost of living to a USD remote salary in 10 minutes – a Node 20 script that scrapes FX rates, applies COL index, and outputs a defensible rate range clients accept.

item.title: RAG at scale: 3 costs tutorials hide
item.description: Cut RAG pipeline costs 78% with deterministic answers, smart caching, and Qdrant — the mistakes and numbers most tutorials skip. Real fintech support agent data from 500k DAU in 2026.

item.title: 2026 AI salary bumps: embeddings & search skills
item.description: 2026 data: engineers skilled in vector search earn 28% more, but embedding optimization pays off earlier—benchmark results, salary ranges, and the exact latency/cost trade-offs most teams ignore.

item.title: Compare WebSocket, SSE, polling head-to-head
item.description: Choose realtime tech in 2026 with hard latency and cost numbers — WebSocket vs SSE vs long polling benchmarked on Node 20, Redis 7.2, and 1000 mobile clients.

item.title: Swapped $84 AI tools for free
item.description: Cut $1,008/year by swapping five paid AI tools for self-hosted LLMs — concrete configs, benchmarks, and the mistakes I made first
